title: Glottisarcon weberbaueri
intro: Unfortunately, I was unable to find any information on the plant Glottisarcon weberbaueri.
taxonomy: Glottisarcon weberbaueri is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. The genus Glottisarcon is a small group of plants native to South America. This species is further classified as a member of the subfamily Rauvolfioideae. The plant is also known to be a part of the tribe WillUGHseeae. The classification is based on morphological and molecular characteristics of the plant.
